meaning: <古>may的第二人称单数现在时(仅与thou连用)
examples: That thou mayest walk in the way of good men, and keep the paths of the righteous.
We have set thee at the worlds center that thou mayest from thence more easily observe whatever is in the world.
Seek not proud riches, but such as thou mayest get justly, use soberly, distribute cheerfully, and leave contentedly.
